text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking with Vodka in front of the station on
our day off, when...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Th-that's awesome!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Check out those guys over there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's looking at a group of rugged-looking
men in leather jackets chatting with each other.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Those jackets they're wearing are vintage—I'm
talkin' fifty years back!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
There's no mistakin' those star-shaped studs
either! Pops has always dreamed of wearin' that
brand!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That's crazy! They're sooo cool!
choice_data_list: You really like leather jackets, huh?
You really like leather jackets, huh?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, 'cause they're so cool!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
My dad likes them too, so sometimes I borrow
his...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The feeling of genuine leather really is on a whole
'nother level! The more you wear it, the more
comfortable it gets. Didja know that?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...I've only got a cheap one made of fake leather,
though.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I still like it, of course, but the real thing just
shines like a beaut!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'd love to have one...
choice_data_list: You could go take one of theirs by force...

Keep on wearing the one you have and it'll get
there.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Are you crazy?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Like I'd do something as lame as that!
choice_data_list: Sorry! It was just a bad joke.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Jokes aside, I tell her that she could always ask
them to show her their jackets.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You think so? But wouldn't it be rude if I just
came up out of nowhere?
choice_data_list: I'm sure it'll be fine if you're polite about it.
I'm sure it'll be fine if you're polite about it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but... What would I even say?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka suddenly starts fidgeting. I guess she gets
shy around people she doesn't know. In that
moment...

text_block_list.name: Man in Leather Jacket A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you two! You keep lookin' over here... You
got a problem?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Agh! I-I mean... Uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
U-umm... Your jackets... They're first-edition
BoTTs, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka summons her courage and talks to them.
Soon after...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That's amazing! They're in such good condition!
And check out that shine!

text_block_list.name: Man in Leather Jacket A
text_block_list.text: Right? You sure know your stuff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka's getting along great with the guys in
leather jackets.

text_block_list.name: Man in Leather Jacket B
text_block_list.text: Hey, you wanna try mine on? It's wicked comfy!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Can I really?! Hell yeah I wanna try it on!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! It's wicked heavy!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Um, do you mind if I take a picture? I wanna brag
to my pops!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka seems quite satisfied after a long,
animated discussion about biker fashion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I assure Vodka that her jacket will be just as cool
as theirs someday.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah... you're right. It will!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All I've gotta do is wear it a bunch and it'll look
just as vintage as theirs!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, it's decided then! I'm gonna put in the
time to make this the best leather jacket there is!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
With these two hands... I'm gonna craft the
pinnacle of all coolness!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just as Vodka starts to get really fired up...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... But I wonder how long that'll take...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I know! I bet I can speed things up by wearing it
out in the rain!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Damage is definitely the fastest way to bring out
that vintage look!
choice_data_list: Is it really cool if you force it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hmm. You've got a point...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: My dad did tell me some things are cool because they take time to age.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: But... sitting around and waiting just isn't my style!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Trainer. Let's run down the road so fast
my jacket gets dirty!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This jacket'll tell my story—about how
hard-boiled I am, of course!
